commonProblems.h2: Mitsubishi Maven Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Mitsubishi Maven's 4G15 petrol engine is generally robust but suffers from timing chain tensioner wear and oil consumption on high-mileage imports. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty. Use this section to decide whether repair or replacement offers better value for your imported Maven.

problems.h4: Timing Chain Tensioner Failure - Why 4G15 Mavens Develop Rattle
problems.affectedModels: Mitsubishi Maven GLX, GLS (2005-2011, 4G15 SOHC MPI)
problems.rootCause: OEM tensioner (MB802600) loses hydraulic pressure over time, allowing chain slack and cold-start rattle.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace tensioner, chain guide rails, inspect chain wear
repairOptions.longevity: Viable only if caught early before chain stretch; prevents catastrophic failure

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace tensioner, chain, guides, sprockets; reset timing
repairOptions.longevity: Addresses wear across entire timing system; suitable for engines with good compression

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt long block with upgraded tensioner, bench-tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value when chain has jumped or caused valve damage; eliminates repeat failure risk

problems.recommendation: On a Maven worth £3,000-£5,000, preventative tensioner replacement at 80k miles is cost-effective. If rattle is loud or chain has jumped, replacement with a rebuilt unit avoids further damage and offers warranty protection.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt 4G15 engine prices for your Mitsubishi Maven

problems.h4: Oil Consumption & Blue Smoke - High-Mileage 4G15 Piston Ring Wear
problems.affectedModels: Mitsubishi Maven GLX, GLS, Indonesian Import (2005-2011, 4G15)
problems.rootCause: Piston rings lose tension with age and heat cycles, allowing oil to pass into combustion chambers.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace PCV valve, valve stem seals, use higher-viscosity oil
repairOptions.longevity: Temporary mitigation; may reduce consumption but won't fix worn rings

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine with new piston rings, upgraded oil pump, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Only permanent solution; restores compression and eliminates blue smoke

problems.recommendation: If consumption exceeds 1L per 1,000 miles, ring wear is advanced. For an imported Maven, a rebuilt long block with warranty offers better long-term value than repeated top-end repairs.
problems.cta: Get quotes for Mitsubishi Maven 4G15 rebuilt engine with upgraded rings

problems.h4: Valve Train Noise - Hydraulic Lash Adjuster Wear on 4G15
problems.rootCause: Hydraulic lash adjusters lose ability to maintain zero clearance, causing persistent ticking from cylinder head.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove cylinder head, replace all 8 lash adjusters, reset valve clearance
repairOptions.longevity: Effective if noise is isolated to adjusters; requires skilled labour on rare import engine

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply reconditioned head with new adjusters, valves, seals; fit to existing block
repairOptions.longevity: Suitable when head has additional wear; avoids full engine replacement if block is sound

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt long block with new head components, bench-tested, warranty included
repairOptions.longevity: Best option when block also shows wear; eliminates uncertainty on aged import engine

problems.recommendation: For a Maven with otherwise good compression, reconditioned head replacement offers good value. If the block has high mileage or oil consumption, a full rebuilt engine provides comprehensive peace of mind.
problems.cta: Find Mitsubishi Maven 4G15 cylinder head or full engine replacement quotes

problems.h4: Overheating & Head Gasket Failure - Cooling System Neglect on Imports
problems.affectedModels: Mitsubishi Maven GLX, GLS, Indonesian Import (2005-2011, 4G15)
problems.typicalFailureMileage: Variable; often triggered by coolant neglect or water pump failure
problems.rootCause: Water pump failure or coolant loss leads to overheating; aluminium head warps, gasket fails, oil/coolant mix.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace water pump, thermostat, flush system, refill with correct coolant
repairOptions.longevity: Preventative only; not viable once head gasket has failed

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove head, machine surface, fit new gasket set, reassemble with torque specs
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if block is undamaged and head is not warped beyond machining limits

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt long block with new head gasket, upgraded water pump, warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended when overheating caused warping or block damage; eliminates repeat risk

problems.recommendation: Once oil/coolant mixing occurs, head gasket repair is often a temporary fix on an aged import. A rebuilt engine with upgraded cooling components offers better reliability for UK road use.
problems.cta: Compare Mitsubishi Maven 4G15 engine replacement prices after overheating

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Mitsubishi Maven
finalCta.paragraph: The Maven's rarity in the UK makes specialist knowledge essential. EngineMarket connects you with import-experienced specialists who understand the 4G15's Colt T120SS origins. Every rebuilt engine includes upgraded components addressing known failure points, backed by a 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty and nationwide delivery. Compare prices and keep your imported Maven on the road without main dealer premiums.

finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Mitsubishi Maven and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

engineYears.intro: This section covers all major engine changes across the Mitsubishi Maven's 2005-2011 production timeline, organised so owners of imported UK examples can quickly identify their 4G15 engine and compare rebuilt replacement prices.

years.description: The Maven launched in Indonesia with the carryover 4G15 engine from the Colt T120SS, establishing the sole powertrain for all UK-imported examples.
keyChanges: Maven introduced as rebadged Suzuki APV with Mitsubishi 4G15 engine
GLX base trim and GLS higher-spec trim launched with identical mechanicals
Engine sourced from Colt T120SS commercial vehicle platform
knownFor: Simple SOHC design aids reliability when maintained
Timing chain tensioner (MB802600) is the primary wear item to monitor
Import documentation critical for UK registration and parts sourcing
years.cta: Get quotes for 2005 Mitsubishi Maven replacement engines
years.ticker: Mitsubishi Maven 4G15 engine replacement • Maven timing chain rattle fix • Indonesian import engine sourcing UK

years.description: No mechanical changes; continued production with the proven 4G15 engine as Indonesian market demand grew.
keyChanges: Minor trim updates for GLS variant; no engine revisions
Increased export activity created more UK private import opportunities
Specialist UK workshops began documenting 4G15 failure patterns
knownFor: Oil consumption becomes noticeable on units exceeding 100k miles
Valve train noise from hydraulic lash adjusters common on neglected examples
Reconditioned 4G15 units emerge as preferred replacement option for UK owners

years.ticker: Maven 4G15 oil consumption fix • GLS engine replacement cost • Reconditioned Maven engine UK

UK specialist network expanded to support growing import owner community
Rebuilt engine suppliers began offering upgraded tensioners as standard
knownFor: Highest-value imports for UK buyers seeking low-mileage examples
Upgraded rebuilt engines with improved tensioners now widely available
Documentation and ECU calibration critical for seamless UK registration

years.ticker: 2011 Maven engine cost • Final year Maven 4G15 • Late production import engine UK

faq.h2: Mitsubishi Maven Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: Is the Mitsubishi Maven 4G15 engine reliable?
items.answer: The 4G15 is generally robust when maintained, but timing chain tensioner wear and oil consumption are common on high-mileage imported examples. Rebuilt units with upgraded components offer the best long-term reliability for UK owners.
keyPoints: Timing chain tensioner (OEM MB802600) requires attention at 80k-120k miles
Oil consumption increases after 100k miles due to piston ring wear
Valve train noise from lash adjusters is common but rarely catastrophic
Rebuilt engines with upgraded parts significantly improve longevity
items.cta: Compare rebuilt 4G15 engine prices for your Mitsubishi Maven

items.question: How much does it cost to replace a Mitsubishi Maven engine in the UK?
items.answer: Rebuilt 4G15 engines for the Maven typically cost £1,700-£2,100 supply-only in the UK, with supply & fit adding £400-£700 depending on location and workshop.
keyPoints: Reconditioned units start from £1,700 with 12-month warranty
Used engines are cheaper (£1,200-£1,600) but carry unknown history
Supply & fit labour adds £400-£700 depending on region
Import-experienced specialists may charge a premium for rare vehicle expertise
items.cta: Get a tailored quote for your Mitsubishi Maven engine replacement

items.question: Where can I buy a Mitsubishi Maven engine in the UK?
items.answer: Specialist import workshops and engine rebuilders familiar with the Colt T120SS-sourced 4G15 are your best option; EngineMarket connects you with vetted UK suppliers experienced with Indonesian imports.
keyPoints: Generalist breakers rarely stock Maven-specific 4G15 units
Import specialists understand ECU calibration and documentation needs
Rebuilt engines from UK specialists include warranty and support
EngineMarket's comparison tool sources quotes from multiple vetted suppliers
items.cta: Find Mitsubishi Maven engine suppliers through EngineMarket

items.question: Will a Suzuki APV engine fit my Mitsubishi Maven?
items.answer: No - while the Maven shares bodywork with the Suzuki APV, it uses the Mitsubishi-sourced 4G15 engine from the Colt T120SS, which is not interchangeable with APV engines.
keyPoints: Maven exclusively uses the Mitsubishi 4G15 SOHC MPI petrol engine
APV engines have different mounting points and ECU calibration
Cross-referencing parts requires Colt T120SS donor knowledge
Using the wrong engine can cause fitment and registration issues
items.cta: Get quotes for the correct 4G15 engine for your Maven

items.question: How long does a Mitsubishi Maven 4G15 engine last?
items.answer: With proper maintenance, the 4G15 can reach 150,000+ miles, but timing chain tensioner wear and oil consumption often drive replacement enquiries between 80k-120k miles on imported examples.
keyPoints: Regular oil changes with correct viscosity extend engine life
Timing chain tensioner should be inspected/preventatively replaced at 80k miles
High-mileage units often develop oil consumption from ring wear
Rebuilt engines with upgraded components can exceed original lifespan
items.cta: Check rebuilt 4G15 engine options for high-mileage Mavens

items.question: Can I import a Mitsubishi Maven engine from Indonesia?
items.answer: Yes, but import costs, documentation, and compatibility checks make UK-sourced rebuilt engines from import-specialist suppliers a more practical and warranty-backed option for most owners.
keyPoints: Import duties, shipping and VAT add significant cost to Indonesian-sourced engines
UK suppliers handle compliance documentation for registration
Rebuilt UK units include warranty and post-fit support
Lead times for imports can delay repairs by weeks or months
items.cta: Compare UK-sourced rebuilt Maven engine prices first

items.question: What is the most common failure on the Mitsubishi Maven 4G15 engine?
items.answer: Timing chain tensioner wear (OEM part MB802600) is the most frequently reported issue, causing cold-start rattle and potential chain jump if neglected on high-mileage imported examples.
keyPoints: Tensioner loses hydraulic pressure after 80k-120k miles
Rattle on cold start is the primary warning symptom
Preventative replacement is far cheaper than repairing valve damage
Rebuilt engines include upgraded tensioners as standard
items.cta: Get quotes for 4G15 engines with upgraded timing components

items.question: How do I identify the engine code on my Mitsubishi Maven?
items.answer: The 4G15 engine code is stamped on the block near the oil filter housing; your V5C registration document and DVLA check via EngineMarket also confirm the exact code for ordering parts.
keyPoints: Engine stamp location: block side, near oil filter
V5C document lists engine capacity and fuel type
DVLA lookup via EngineMarket verifies exact 4G15 variant
Colt T120SS donor reference helps cross-check parts compatibility
items.cta: Use EngineMarket's reg check to confirm your Maven's engine code

items.question: Does the Mitsubishi Maven have an automatic transmission option?
items.answer: Yes, both GLX and GLS trims were available with a 4-speed automatic; the 4G15 engine is identical to manual variants, so replacement engines are fully compatible with automatic Mavens.
keyPoints: Automatic and manual Mavens share the same 4G15 engine block
ECU calibration differs slightly; confirm variant when ordering
Rebuilt engines are supplied ready for either transmission type
Supply & fit specialists can handle automatic-specific commissioning
items.cta: Compare engine prices for automatic Mitsubishi Maven

items.question: What warranty do rebuilt Mitsubishi Maven engines include?
items.answer: Rebuilt 4G15 engines supplied through EngineMarket include a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty from UK specialists, covering parts and labour for fitment-related issues.
keyPoints: 12-month warranty is standard across EngineMarket's network
Unlimited mileage coverage protects high-use imported vehicles
Warranty terms vary slightly by supplier; confirm before ordering
Documentation provided for UK registration and insurance purposes
items.cta: View warranty-backed rebuilt engine options for your Maven
